title: Interface with multiple initial blocks causes 'Duplicate declaration of member name' error

features.name: interface with multiple initial blocks
features.description: Code should include an interface definition containing more than one initial block
features.snippet: interface my_iface; int value; initial value = 0; initial $display("Init 1"); initial $display("Init 2"); endinterface

features.name: interface with function method
features.description: Code should include an interface containing an inline function definition that accesses interface members
features.snippet: interface my_iface; int value; function int get_value(); return value; endfunction endinterface

features.name: interface method call from module
features.description: Code should include a module instantiating an interface and calling an interface method on the instance
features.snippet: module t; my_iface iface(); initial if (iface.get_value() !== 0) $stop; endmodule
